children.heading: Authority of Director to establish rules and regulations
children.label: a Authority of Director to establish rules and regulations
children.text: The Director may establish such rules, regulations, guidelines, and procedures as are necessary to carry out any function of the Director under this subchapter.

children.heading: Recordkeeping
children.label: b Recordkeeping
children.text: Each recipient of sums under this subchapter shall keep such records as the Director shall prescribe, including records that fully disclose the amount and disposition by such recipient of such sums, the total cost of the undertaking for which such sums are used, and that portion of the cost of the undertaking supplied by other sources, and such other records as will facilitate an effective audit.

children.heading: Access of Director to books and records for purpose of audit and examination
children.label: c Access of Director to books and records for purpose of audit and examination
children.text: The Director shall have access, for purpose of audit and examination, to any books, documents, papers, and records of the recipient of sums under this subchapter that, in the opinion of the Director, may be related to the expenditure of funds received under this subchapter.

children.heading: Revealing research or statistical information; prohibition; immunity from legal proceedings; permission; admission of information as evidence
children.label: d Revealing research or statistical information; prohibition; immunity from legal proceedings; permission; admission of information as evidence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided by Federal law, no officer or employee of the Federal Government, and no recipient of sums under this subchapter, shall use or reveal any research or statistical information furnished under this subchapter by any person and identifiable to any specific private person for any purpose other than the purpose for which such information was obtained in accordance with this subchapter. Such information, and any copy of such information, shall be immune from legal process and shall not, without the consent of the person furnishing such information, be admitted as evidence or used for any purpose in any action, suit, or other judicial, legislative, or administrative proceeding.

children.heading: Discrimination prohibited
children.label: e Discrimination prohibited
children.text: No person shall on the ground of race, color, religion, national origin, handicap, or sex be excluded from participation in, denied the benefits of, subjected to discrimination under, or denied employment in connection with, any undertaking funded in whole or in part with sums made available under this subchapter.

children.heading: Failure to comply with provisions; notice and hearing; power of Director
children.label: f Failure to comply with provisions; notice and hearing; power of Director

children.text: suspend payments to such State until the Director is satisfied that such noncompliance has ended; or
take such other action as the Director deems appropriate.

children.heading: Report
children.label: g Report
children.text: The Director shall, on , and on June 30 every two years thereafter, report to the President and to the Congress on the revenue derived from each source described in and on the effectiveness of the activities supported under this subchapter. The Director may include in such report recommendations for legislation to improve this subchapter.December 31, 1990section 20101 of this title

children.heading: Maintenance of effort
children.label: h Maintenance of effort
children.text: Each entity receiving sums made available under this subchapter for administrative purposes shall certify that such sums will not be used to supplant State or local funds, but will be used to increase the amount of such funds that would, in the absence of Federal funds, be made available for these purposes.
